ValidationRule.description: Once payment is remitted, do not allow payment to be updated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(AND( ISCHANGED(Is_Payment_Remitted__c), Is_Payment_Remitted__c = false), AND(NOT(ISCHANGED(Is_Payment_Remitted__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED( Actioned__c )), Is_Payment_Remitted__c = true))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Payment is remitted hence you can not update the record
